overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game featuring a samurai character walking through a snowy Japanese landscape at night. The character travels along a lantern-lit path, passes through a large red torii gate, and continues across open snow fields toward a distant village.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered shrine approach path with wooden fences

events.description: NPC in brown robes crosses the path from right to left ahead of the player

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path toward the illuminated torii gate in the distance

notable_agents.action: figure in traditional robes walking ahead near the torii gate

low wooden fence lining the right side of the path

snow-covered pine trees surrounding the path
snow-covered pine trees on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snow-covered path flanked by wooden fences and illuminated by warm stone lanterns. A large red torii gate stands prominently in the distance, with snow-covered trees framing the approach. Another figure in traditional robes is visible ahead near the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing through the torii gate threshold

events.description: character passes underneath the large red torii gate
exiting the lantern-lit gate area into the more open, dimly lit snow field

agents.ego_description: walking through the torii gate and emerging into the open landscape beyond

entered.detail: expansive open area covered in snow visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the massive red torii gate, transitioning from the enclosed path to an open snow-covered landscape. The wooden fences fall away as the scene opens up, with the gate structure moving to the left as the character proceeds forward into the wider environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with distant village

events.description: fully entering the open snow field, leaving the torii gate behind

agents.ego_description: walking across the open snow field toward distant village lights visible on the horizon

entered.detail: warm lights from buildings visible in the far distance
sparse snow-covered trees dotting the open landscape
sparse trees on the right side of the open field

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a vast open snow field under the night sky, with the torii gate now far behind. Sparse trees dot the landscape, and warm lights from a distant village twinkle on the horizon. The wooden fence continues along the far left edge of the field.

events.description: stone archway structure becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a large stone archway structure while walking along the snow-covered path

entered.detail: large stone archway or bridge structure spanning the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prominent stone archway structure that spans the path ahead. The wooden fence returns closer to the path on the left, and the surrounding trees become denser. The distant village lights are no longer visible as the character focuses on the archway ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, lantern-lit walkway that opens into a vast, snowy expanse. It begins by trailing the character along a narrow path flanked by wooden fences and warm stone lanterns, moving toward a prominent red torii gate framed by snow-covered trees. As the character approaches the gate and a distant figure in traditional robes, the camera maintains its forward momentum, passing directly beneath the massive red structure. The scene then expands as the wooden fences fall away and the torii gate shifts to the left, transitioning the environment from an enclosed corridor into a wide, open landscape of deep snow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast, moonlit snow field that gradually narrows into a wooded approach toward a stone monument. It begins with the character traversing an open expanse of white under a dark night sky, leaving a distant torii gate behind while warm village lights twinkle on the far horizon. As the character advances, the wide landscape begins to tighten, and the distant glow of the village fades from view. The scene then shifts as the surrounding trees grow denser and a wooden fence draws closer to the path, guiding the movement toward a prominent stone archway that spans the way ahead.
